HELLKNIGHT_BANNER_SLUG.NAME: Hellknight Banner item slug
HELLKNIGHT_BANNER_SLUG.HINT: PF2e item slug used to find the Hellknight Banner on an actor (match your compendium item).

ECHO_FRAGMENT_SLUG.NAME: Echo Fragment item slug
ECHO_FRAGMENT_SLUG.HINT: PF2e item slug used to find Echo Fragment consumables on the roller.

DEBUG_CHAT_CONTEXT.NAME: Debug: chat context menus (console)
DEBUG_CHAT_CONTEXT.HINT: Log [desires-echoes-of-creation][context] lines to the devtools console. Electron: Help, Toggle Developer Tools. Turn ON, reload (F5), confirm the yellow "Debug is ON" line on load; right-click chat for hook:* logs.

WARN.PF2E_ONLY: Desires Echoes of Creation requires the Pathfinder 2e system.
WARN.STEADY_PF2E_API: Steady the Line: could not update this PF2e chat card automatically. Adjust the degree of success manually.
WARN.ECHO_PF2E_API: Echo Fragment: no PF2e reroll handler was found on this message. Use the system reroll tools, then adjust Echo Fragment quantity manually if needed.
WARN.ECHO_NO_ITEM: No Echo Fragment item found on this actor (check the slug setting).
WARN.ECHO_NOT_OWNER: You can only Echo-reroll your own rolls.
WARN.STEADY_IMMUNE: That ally is currently immune to Steady the Line from this banner (until daily preparation clears the flag in a future update, use the actor Flags tab to remove steadyLineImmune if needed).
WARN.STEADY_NO_BEARER: Steady the Line: you must control an actor who is openly carrying the Hellknight Banner.
